notes: Most files are incorrectly categorized as Poetry when they contain lesson content or advertisements. Several files contain advertisement content that should be consolidated into a Misc file. The main lesson articles (Editorial Insurance, Genealogy, Home Ethics, Home Gardening, Literature, Art and Architecture, Conference Notes) are all present but need proper categorization and cleanup of advertisement bleed.
